name: Prosciutto Olive Tomato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the temperature specified in the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan, ensuring an even distribution.
4. Place the pan in the preheated oven and bake according to the manufacturer's instructions.
5. Once baked, remove from the oven and allow to cool before slicing and serving.
